meaning: n.[化]弱金鸡纳碱(提取于金鸡纳树皮)
examples: Two chiral P, N-ligands were synthesized in high yields from natural quinine and cinchonine under mild conditions.
Diastereomers of cinchonine and cinchonidine were fully separated both under isocratic and gradient elutions on the chiral monolithic column.
Working with Pelletier, he isolated quinine, strychnine, brucine, cinchonine, veratrine, and colchicine, some of which became widely used as drugs.
